backlog.title: Optimize Database Queries
backlog.why: Optimizing queries will improve the overall performance of the application.

backlog.title: Add Environment-Specific Configuration Management
backlog.why: This will make it easier to manage configurations across different environments (development, testing, production).

backlog.title: Refactor Workflow Service for better readability
backlog.goal: Improve the readability and maintainability of the workflow service
backlog.why: A cleaner codebase is easier to understand, debug, and scale.

backlog.title: Create TypeScript Configuration for Better DX
backlog.goal: Enhance developer experience with a consistent TypeScript configuration
backlog.why: A well-configured TypeScript setup can help prevent common errors and improve code quality.
backlog.commit_message: chore(typescript): create TypeScript configuration for better DX

history.title: Fix Memory Leak in Message Repository
Implement JWT Authentication for API Endpoints

history.summary: The repository contains a mix of backend services and database operations. The goal is to improve security, performance, product functionality, and ensure comprehensive testing.
